subcodes.title: Words spoken at Haifa Pilgrim House, 1920-10-23
subcodes.first_line: Here is the place of health, but the place of spiritual health. Whoever is weak and comes here will become strong.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @race unity; racial issues, @plenitude; the pervasiveness of life in the cosmos, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence
